body.title: audit_runner: no-cortex-store-bypass reports stdout 'PASS' but exit-code FAIL
body.result: run_shell now uses exit code as authoritative signal (0=PASS, non-0=FAIL). Previously any stdout was treated as FAIL, causing PASS-printing checks to be misreported. Committed 6edc38e7.
body.description:
Day-close audit 2026-04-23: no-cortex-store-bypass check stdout starts with 'PASS:' but the runner counts it as FAIL. Either the exit code or the success-detection rule is off. Investigate audit_runner.py logic.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/audit_runner.py.
**Test plan:** audit_runner --drain reports the check correctly.
